title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a decentralized memory layer that persists context across multiple AI agents and tools. It stores encrypted, user-owned memories that agents from different providers can access and recall, enabling continuity across Claude, Codex, Pi, and other AI systems.
